ops.body: Shipped in v0.18.0 (2026-07-23): the "empty-chip one-click compose decision" item is DONE — CommentChip click now pins the block, opens the margin surface (floating rail ≥1100px / comments sheet below), and focuses the composer; locked threads open read-only (locked prop wired from Approval's allowFeedback). The rail itself was rebuilt as a floating hover-expand overlay (web/src/components/MarginRail.tsx, web/src/railOpen.ts) and the panel gained content states (masthead, pinned slip, feed excerpts, designed empty state). Also relevant to the "rail empty-state for non-conversation blocks" item: the panel now has a designed board-wide empty state, but per-block non-conversation handling is still open. Two new micro-observations from final QA, filed here rather than lost: (1) option-card hover lift at translateY(-2px) is mechanically present but faint on dark in static screenshots — acceptable live, revisit only if users miss it; (2) the Other write-in textarea still shows the native resize grabber in its corner.
